content.en:
Seeing that these purple death flowers closed their mouths, Ye Tian decided to forcibly attack these purple death flowers, with his current strength, he would not be afraid of these purple death flowers.

It's just that in this way, the difficulty of collecting the purple flower liquid has increased, and the collection speed has been slow.

However, in the face of a treasure like purple flower liquid, Ye Tian was not impatient at all.

In the following days, Ye Tian continued to fight with the Purple Flower of Death, but unfortunately, the root system of the Purple Flower of Death penetrated deep into the depths of the earth, and it was difficult to ingest into the Void Mina Realm.

Therefore, it was difficult for Ye Tian to kill a single purple flower of death, and it was even difficult to hurt them, so he could only suppress these purple flowers of death.

Ye Tian attacked these purple death flowers, and if these purple death flowers attacked Ye Tian, they had to open their flower openings, so that Ye Tian could confirm which purple death flowers had purple flower liquid.

In this way, Ye Tian slowly collected the purple flower liquid.

Time passed slowly, and half a year passed in the blink of an eye.

Danta didn't specify how long he would stay in the Stygian Flower Realm, but the spatial passage would be closed in ten years, so he only needed to leave the Stygian Flower Realm within the ten-year period.

Therefore, Ye Tian was not in a hurry at all.

In the blink of an eye, three years have passed.

Ye Tian didn't know how many times he had fought with the Purple Flower of Death in the past three years, but the final result was good, and he collected about thirty catties of purple flower liquid.

Although this amount is not as good as ordinary flower sap, its value is definitely far higher than that of ordinary flower sap.

Ye Tian also wanted to collect enough purple flower liquid, but unfortunately there were not many purple death flowers with purple flower liquid, and these purple death flowers protected the purple flower liquid very well, he needed to fight again and again to know which purple death flowers had purple flower liquid, so the speed of finding purple flower liquid was very slow.

In addition, the number of purple death flowers in the sea of death flowers is not too much, and being able to collect 30 catties of purple flower liquid is already quite a good harvest.

"It's hard to collect more purple flower sap, it's time to go to the core area of the Death Flower Sea to take a look!"

Ye Tian muttered.

The core area of the Death Flower Sea was not large, but it was shrouded in a faint purple mist, and it was difficult for the divine sense to penetrate and see the situation inside.

For fear of accidents, Ye Tian never entered the core area to investigate.

Now, the purple flower liquid has almost been collected, Ye Tian is ready to enter the core area of the Death Flower Sea to take a look, if there is nothing to gain, he is ready to leave the Stygian Flower Realm.

Shout!

Ye Tian passed through the purple mist and entered the core area.

Before entering the core area, Ye Tian even turned on all the means of defense, just preparing for a battle.

But he never expected that the core area was not dangerous at all.

There was only a blood-red flower of death here, and in the face of Ye Tian's arrival, this flower of death had no intention of attacking at all.

"Check!"

Ye Tian used the copying talent to instantly understand the talent situation of this flower of death.

Talent Identification
Species: Death Flower Emperor
Bloodline Talent: Universe level
Strength Talent: God
Speed Talent: God-level
Defense Talent: God-level
Devouring Talent: God-level
Damage Transfer Talent: God-level

......

"Death Flower Emperor, this Flower of Death should be the source of the Death Flower Sea, the Emperor of Flowers, and can even control the entire Death Flower Sea!" Ye Tian guessed.

At this time, the Death Flower Emperor was emitting wisps of pollen, spreading and spreading to all parts of the Death Flower Sea.

Ye Tian took a look at it and knew the use of these pollen.

These pollen are similar to seeds that can give birth to the flower of death.

He even went to take a look at the Flower of Death that he had destroyed, and a new Flower of Death had already begun to be born there, indicating that even if the Flower of Death was partially destroyed, the Flower Emperor of Death could still cultivate another batch.

It can even be said that the sea of death flowers has always been expanding.

As for why the Death Flower Emperor didn't attack Ye Tian, there was only one reason.

"It's afraid of me, so it doesn't dare to attack rashly!"

Ye Tian guessed.

If this is the case, it means that this Death Flower Emperor has a high level of wisdom.

Ye Tian stared at the Death Flower Emperor and pondered for a long time.

Eventually, he made a decision to subdue the Death Flower Emperor.

This Death Flower Emperor is of great use to him, if he subdues the Death Flower Emperor, he can plant the Death Flower Emperor in his Chaos Ancient Realm.

And he has copied the damage transfer talent, but he has not fused, once he has fused the damage transfer talent and subdued the Death Flower Emperor, then he can transfer the damage to the Flower of Death.

In this way, if he encounters an irresistible strong enemy in the future, he can transfer the damage away, which is equivalent to immortality.

As soon as he thought of this, Ye Tian was excited.

"Death Flower Emperor, must be subdued!"

Ye Tian's eyes flashed and he said.

"Death Flower Emperor, don't pretend, I know you have a high level of wisdom, surrender to me, how about it?"

Ye Tianlang said.

After about a few seconds, the Death Flower Emperor finally spoke: "Human, you want to subdue me, dreaming. I'm the Death Flower Emperor, you should know very well that your attacks can be diverted away, and you can't even kill ordinary purple Death Flowers, so is there a way to kill me?"

"Are you sure?"

Ye Tian sneered.

"I'm so confident in my own strength and talent, you can't help me at all!"

Death Flower Emperor said.

"Hey, actually, I don't want to use this talent, but if you don't surrender, then you can't blame me!"

As he spoke, a green mist appeared on Ye Tian's hands, and there were more and more of them.

"This is my god-level poison curse talent, which can release all kinds of curse poison, even spell poison, which only needs to be contaminated a little bit to spread all over the body. Can you transfer damage, can you also transfer the curse poison? If you can transfer, then even better, even the entire sea of death flowers will be spread by the curse poison. Even if you can suppress the Spell Gu Poison in time, as long as I keep releasing the Spell Gu Poison, you will still not be able to withstand it in the end. "

After speaking, Ye Tian launched an attack on the Death Flower Emperor.

Although the Death Flower Emperor is the Flower Emperor of the Death Flower Sea, his strength is only a little stronger than the ordinary purple Death Flower, which is about the same as the Devouring Beast.

Such strength couldn't stop Ye Tian, and he was quickly injured by Ye Tian.

Although the Death Flower Emperor transferred the damage away, Ye Tian's curse Gu poison invaded the Death Flower Emperor's body.

Suddenly, a green spot appeared on one of the petals of the Death Flower Emperor, and it continued to spread.

At the first moment, the Death Flower Emperor noticed the curse Gu poison and tried his best to suppress it, trying to annihilate these curse Gu poison.

But soon, it was terrified!

The curse poison could not be annihilated at all, and although it was suppressed, it still spread throughout the body at a very slow speed.

In desperation, it had only one solution.

Click!!

The petals of the flower contaminated with the curse poison were cut off by it and fell to the ground not far away.

Soon, the petal turned all green, apparently completely covered in the curse poison.

"Cutting off the petals is a very clever way, but if I keep casting spells on you, will you have to keep cutting off the petals and eventually commit suicide?"

Ye Tian asked.

"How on earth can you let me go?"

The Death Flower Emperor's voice carried a hint of pleading.

"Surrender to me and recognize me as the master, and I can take you out of the Stygian Flower Realm, in the Stygian Flower Realm, your cultivation will be difficult to improve, and there will be a day when you die. However, if you leave the Stygian Flower Realm, your cultivation can break through the limitations, and you may even have the hope of becoming a cosmic god with an eternal lifespan. In contrast, you're just giving your freedom. Besides, if you stay here and can't move, you're not free. Therefore, you consider me to be the Lord, and there is nothing to lose. "

"Surrender or die, the choice is yours!"

Ye Tian gave an ultimatum.
